headline: Ben Jacobs
body: Vuskovic has agreed a five-year contract.⬇️ Ben Jacobs (JacobsBen) BREAKING: Brighton agree a £46m fee with Spurs for Luka Vuskovic, as FabrizioRomano called. Spurs retain a 20% sell-on. Understand the plan is for Vuskovic to undergo his medical with the national team if Croatia beat Portugal. Vuskovic has agreed a five-year contract.🇭🇷 🤝 alex_crook —
raw_text:
Vuskovic has agreed a five-year contract.⬇️


Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

BREAKING: Brighton agree a £46m fee with Spurs for Luka Vuskovic, as @FabrizioRomano called. Spurs retain a 20% sell-on.

Understand the plan is for Vuskovic to undergo his medical with the national team if Croatia beat Portugal.

Vuskovic has agreed a five-year contract.🇭🇷

🤝 @alex_crook





— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2072336525900337314#m
